violations.text: Establishment does not have an individual with the Rhode Island Manager Certified In Food Safety license. Establishment to register. Application provided during time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/12/2026

Utensils observed in the mop sink during this inspection. Proper sink for wash, rinse, and sanitize reviewed. -Staff removed the utensils from the mop sink during this inspection to wash, rinse, and sanitize at the 3 bay sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023

The doors and windows were opened at the time of this inspection. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by installing screens to windows and doors. -Staff closed the doors during this inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 08/03/2023

The mop sink is adjacent to the hand-washing sink. A splash guard shall be installed to the mop sink to prevent any possible contamination to the hand-washing sink. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
Ice buildup observed in the back refrigeration unit. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 08/31/2023
